task_objective: Bound Ludusavi operations and add watchdog absolute resume ceiling (Review Finding B3)
design_decisions: Set LUDUSAVI_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS to 900.0 (15 minutes) to be generous for Ludusavi cloud syncs of large saves over slow links.
Set LUDUSAVI_PREVIEW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS to 300.0 (5 minutes) to be generous for manifest updates on first run.
Decided not to add a cancellation RPC; this is out of scope and could be future work.
Left backups_list on the executor's 30s default because it does not accept a timeout parameter.
test_force_backup_timeout_fails_and_releases_operation_lock passed immediately once wired correctly, acting as a regression guard for the lock-release behavior.
results: All tests green. Timeouts applied to adapter calls and absolute watchdog ceiling enforced.
